introSection: Bumerang is a steel shuttle roller coaster currently located at Tashkentland in Yunusabad, Tashkent City, Uzbekistan.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains are built by Arrow Dynamics

fullText:
Bumerang is a steel shuttle roller coaster currently located at Tashkentland in Yunusabad, Tashkent City, Uzbekistan.



Red track and blue supports.

The trains are built by Arrow Dynamics
